description:
The diagnostic that pays back the foundation work. PR #18 already
populates `Module.callsite_outcomes` with verdicts for every callsite;
this ticket makes that data legible by (a) enriching `Stalled` so it
explains *why*, and (b) shipping a `fz dump --emit outcomes` printer.

## Part 1: Enrich Stalled

Replace `CallsiteOutcome::Stalled` with a reason-bearing variant:

```rust
pub enum StalledReason {
    OpaqueArg,         // args not all literal-Descr
    BudgetExhausted,   // unroll budget hit
    NonReduciblePrim,  // Extern, MakeMap, etc. in callee body
    BoundaryFn,        // callee in module.boundary_fns
    NoClosureLitTarget, // CallClosure operand isn't a closure_lit
    StructuralDecrease, // same-callee recursive call without arg shrinkage
    CalleeBodyShape,   // multi-block, Halt, or other non-foldable shape
    Other,             // catch-all; expanded as needed
}

pub enum CallsiteOutcome {
    Consumed { result: Descr },
    Inlined,
    Emitted  { target: SpecKey },
    Stalled  { reason: StalledReason },
}
```

The reducer writes the specific reason at every `Stalled` site. Threading
this through `try_reduce_call` / `walk_block` is a small refactor — each
None-returning branch in `walk_block` becomes Some-with-reason.

## Part 2: fz dump --emit outcomes

Add the diagnostic printer. Output groups by caller fn, lists each
callsite with slot + verdict + reason:

```
outcomes for fixtures/closure_typed_captures/input.fz

main:
  blk0 Direct        → Stalled (OpaqueArg)
  blk0 Cont           → Emitted (k_print/1 key=[int])
apply1:
  blk0 ClosureLit(0,0) → Emitted (fn14/3 key=[10, 20, 12])
add_to:
  (no callsites in body)
```

Implementation: mirror `dump_bodies_pipeline` in main.rs. Run the
codegen pipeline up through `reduce_module` + `type_module`, then
format `module.callsite_outcomes` from the reduced module.

## Acceptance

- StalledReason enum + outcome variant lands; reducer writes specific
  reasons. Existing tests green (debug invariants from .5 / .9 still
  hold).
- `fz dump --emit outcomes` runs cleanly on every fixture.
- 3-5 fixture outcomes are blessed as goldens (ast_eval,
  fib_tailrec, closure_typed_captures, multi_clause, curried_add)
  so future regressions in fold coverage surface in CI.
- A short walkthrough (in commit message or NEXT-style note) showing
  how to answer "why didn't X fold?" via the dump.

## Why this is the right last act of the epic

The foundation (data model + reducer publishes + typer reads +
shared enumerator) already shipped in PR #18. Without the diagnostic,
the diary is written but unread. This ticket is what makes the
foundation's value visible — both immediately (existing debugging
gets easier) and durably (golden outcomes catch coverage regressions
that fixture goldens miss).

Scope: roughly half a day. ~200 LoC: enum + reducer threading +
printer + 3-5 golden fixtures.

## Removes

Nothing.
title: fz-CO.F.2 — Enrich outcomes with reasons + fz dump --emit outcomes
